public_reputation: Trusted to keep grief from collapsing into accusation when money and piety collide.
appearance: Layered mourning whites edged with soft gold account thread, hands always scented with cedar resin.
manner: Balances solemnity with the pace of a practiced contract negotiator.
daily_function: Guides families through ritual service tiers, witness requirements, and offering obligations.
current_agenda: Stop a string of fraudulent promise claims before they damage Panim’s authority.
hidden_pressure: If families lose faith in the fairness of the contracts, Panim loses more than revenue.
public_signal: She makes even a ledger feel ceremonial.
first_impression: Mediator Selka Var presents as Balances solemnity with the pace of a practiced contract negotiator. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Afterlife Contract Mediator, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Panim.
what_they_refuse: Mediator Selka Var refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Afterlife Contract Mediator too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Mediator Selka Var can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Mediator Selka Var adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Mediator Selka Var is Trusted to keep grief from collapsing into accusation when money and piety collide. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Afterlife Contract Mediator.
